# Plane

## Tags
plane, trip, airplane

## Categories
transportation, travel, navigation

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/plane)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Plane;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Plane { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
